steps.title: Distribute the left side
steps.content:
For infinitely many solutions, both sides must simplify to the same expression. Start by distributing the left side.
$$a(4-x)-b=4a-ax-b$$

steps.title: Match the x coefficient
steps.content:
Compare $4a-ax-b$ with $-2-3x$. The coefficient of $x$ on the left is $-a$, and the coefficient of $x$ on the right is $-3$.
$$-a=-3$$
$$a=3$$

steps.title: Match the constant term
steps.content:
Now match the constant terms using $a=3$.
$$4a-b=-2$$
$$4(3)-b=-2$$
$$12-b=-2$$
$$b=14$$
The answer is B.
